message:
feat(cli): implement pt agent import-priors command

Add handler for agent import-priors subcommand to import priors from
external JSON files. Features:
- --from/-i: Input file path (required)
- --merge: Merge with existing priors (default)
- --replace: Replace existing priors entirely
- --host-profile: Filter by host profile
- --dry-run: Preview changes without modifying
- --no-backup: Skip creating backup of existing priors

Import supports both:
- Export format (with "priors" key)
- Direct Priors schema documents

Atomic writes via temp file + rename, with automatic backup.
Pairs with export-priors for machine-to-machine priors transfer.

Closes: process_triage-r2of

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
